summary.en: Electrical equipment imported into Sri Lanka must comply with SLSI labelling requirements and Sri Lanka Customs import procedures. Product labels must be in English (the primary commercial language for technical equipment) and may require Sri Lanka-specific model identification, country of origin, rated electrical parameters (voltage, frequency, power), and importer details. SLSI may require a conformity certificate or type-approval marking before sale. Sri Lanka Customs requires accurate tariff classification and import documentation.
summary.zh: 进口至斯里兰卡的电气设备须符合SLSI标签要求和斯里兰卡海关进口程序。产品标签须使用英语（技术设备的主要商业语言），可能需要包含斯里兰卡特定型号标识、原产地、额定电气参数（电压、频率、功率）和进口商信息。SLSI可能要求销售前提供符合性证书或型式批准标识。斯里兰卡海关要求准确的关税归类和进口文件。
summary.zht: 進口至斯里蘭卡的電氣設備須符合SLSI標籤要求和斯里蘭卡海關進口程序。產品標籤須使用英語（技術設備的主要商業語言），可能需要包含斯里蘭卡特定型號標識、原產地、額定電氣參數（電壓、頻率、功率）和進口商信息。SLSI可能要求銷售前提供符合性證書或型式批准標識。斯里蘭卡海關要求準確的關稅歸類和進口文件。

standards_or_laws: SLSI requirements for electrical equipment labelling and type-approval marking
Sri Lanka Customs import procedures and tariff classification (HS code for PV inverters)
Sri Lanka Consumer Affairs Authority Act (applicable labelling obligations)

summary.en: Chinese PV inverters carry CCC marks (where applicable), Chinese-language nameplate data, GB-rated electrical parameters, and Chinese customs export documentation. Chinese-only labelling is not accepted for Sri Lanka; export versions must carry English-language parameter labels meeting the Sri Lanka Customs and SLSI documentation requirements.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器贴有（适用时的）CCC标志、中文铭牌数据、GB额定电气参数和中国海关出口文件。仅有中文标签不被斯里兰卡接受；出口版本须贴有英文参数标签，满足斯里兰卡海关和SLSI文件要求。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器貼有（適用時的）CCC標誌、中文銘牌數據、GB額定電氣參數和中國海關出口文件。僅有中文標籤不被斯里蘭卡接受；出口版本須貼有英文參數標籤，滿足斯里蘭卡海關和SLSI文件要求。

standards_or_laws: China Compulsory Certification (CCC) — not applicable in Sri Lanka

gap.en: Chinese domestic labelling and CCC marks have no standing in Sri Lanka. Exporters must produce English-language labels with Sri Lanka-compliant rated parameter data (230/400 V, 50 Hz), country of origin, and importer contact details. SLSI type-approval or registration evidence should accompany the shipment. Sri Lanka Customs HS classification for PV inverters should be confirmed before shipping.
gap.zh: 中国国内标签和CCC标志在斯里兰卡无效。出口商须制作包含斯里兰卡兼容额定参数数据（230/400 V、50 Hz）、原产地和进口商联系信息的英文标签。SLSI型式批准或注册证据应随货附上。出货前应确认光伏逆变器的斯里兰卡海关HS编码。
gap.zht: 中國國內標籤和CCC標誌在斯里蘭卡無效。出口商須製作包含斯里蘭卡兼容額定參數數據（230/400 V、50 Hz）、原產地和進口商聯系信息的英文標籤。SLSI型式批准或注冊證據應隨貨附上。出貨前應確認光伏逆變器的斯里蘭卡海關HS編碼。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — English labelling, SLSI documentation, and correct Customs HS classification are required for legal import and sale
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under CGB and CCC rules for domestic Chinese market; export labelling requirements differ

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese domestic labelling and CCC marks are not valid in Sri Lanka. Prepare English-language labels with Sri Lanka-rated parameters, confirm SLSI type-approval or registration status, and verify Customs HS classification before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国国内标签和CCC标志在斯里兰卡无效。需准备包含斯里兰卡额定参数的英文标签，确认SLSI型式批准或注册状态，并在出货前核实海关HS编码。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國國內標籤和CCC標誌在斯里蘭卡無效。需準備包含斯里蘭卡額定參數的英文標籤，確認SLSI型式批准或注冊狀態，並在出貨前核實海關HS編碼。
